_description: Golden capture of review-result-writer.sh no-flag invocation to codex-send-wait. Captured 2026-06-14; resynced 2026-06-25 after T-P0 writer upgrade — the no-flag path now forwards the default send_wait (1500) as --timeout so daemon_worst(1440) < send_wait(1500) holds uniformly. writer_pre_hash is unchanged (284049b): the writer source was not modified in this update, only the argv golden was resynced to match actual behavior (the previous argv omitted --timeout, making this a dead file guarded by skipped tests).
